---

name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new module, function, example, dataset, or documentation improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
-------------

## Feature summary

Describe the proposed feature clearly.

## Motivation

Why is this feature useful?

Explain the scientific, engineering, educational, or practical need.

## Proposed functionality

Describe what the feature should do.

Example:

```text
Add a UV/H2O2 screening function that estimates apparent radical generation from H2O2 dose, UV efficiency, and optical attenuation.
```

## Suggested inputs

List possible input parameters.

```text
-
-
-
```

## Suggested outputs

List expected outputs.

```text
-
-
-
```

## Scientific basis

If relevant, describe the equations, assumptions, or references that support this feature.

## Engineering interpretation

Explain how the feature would help users interpret AOP performance or treatment-train behavior.

## Possible limitations

Describe what the feature should not claim or should treat cautiously.

## Additional context

Add any related examples, papers, datasets, or implementation notes.
